zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_1: $self$像是感应到了什么，舒服地叹了口气，顺势向后靠进$target$的怀里。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_2: $self$并没有回头，只是自然地挺直了腰背，方便$target$的手掌贴合上来。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_3: $self$放下了手中的东西，像只被抚摸脊背的猫一样眯起了眼睛。"嗯……正好这里有点酸。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_4: $self$发出一声轻笑，反手轻轻拍了拍$target$的手背，却没有推开。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_5: $self$的肩膀放松下来，微微低头露出后颈，默许了$target$的动作。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_6: $self$嘟囔了一句"别闹"，但身体却诚实地向$target$的手心蹭了蹭。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_7: $self$愣了一下，身体瞬间僵硬，但并没有立刻躲开。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_8: $self$有些错愕地回头看了一眼$target$，眼神里充满了疑惑，却没说什么。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_9: $self$虽然感到意外，但出于礼貌还是保持了原本的姿势。"呃……有什么事吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_10: $self$有些局促地缩了缩脖子，似乎在评估这个动作的含义。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_11: $self$尴尬地笑了笑，不知道该作何反应，只好任由$target$把手放在背上。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_12: $self$停下了手里的动作，屏住呼吸，等待着$target$的下一步举动。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_13: $self$浑身颤抖了一下，却不敢回头，只能死死咬住嘴唇。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_14: $self$的指关节因为用力抓紧衣角而泛白，虽然害怕却不敢反抗。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_15: $self$像是受惊的兔子一样瑟缩着，眼里充满了恐惧，却被迫定在原地。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_16: $self$紧闭双眼，似乎在忍受着极大的不适，呼吸变得急促而紊乱。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_17: $self$低着头，身体极度紧绷，仿佛$target$的手是滚烫的烙铁。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_Begin_18: $self$虽然满脸抗拒，但在$target$的注视下还是强迫自己没有逃离。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_1: $self$在睡梦中皱了皱眉，似乎感到有什么东西在背上游走，发出一声含糊的呓语。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_2: $self$并没有醒来，只是本能地将被子裹紧了一些，试图隔绝那只手。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_3: $self$呼吸依旧均匀，对于背上的触碰毫无防备，完全沉浸在深沉的睡眠中。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_4: $self$被摸得舒服了，无意识地在枕头上蹭了蹭脸颊，像只熟睡的小动物。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_5: $self$翻了个身，正好将后背完全暴露在$target$的手下，毫无察觉地继续睡着。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_6: $self$嘴唇微微张开，发出一声轻微的哼声，对于入侵者的行为做出了最原始的生理反应。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_7: $self$保持着原本的动作凝固在空气中，毫无知觉地承受着背后的触碰。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_8: $self$的肌肤上留下了被抚摸的红痕，但那双眼睛依旧毫无生气地注视着虚空。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_9: $self$像精致的人偶一样一动不动，对于脊背上游走的手掌没有任何生理反馈。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_10: $self$静止在时间缝隙里，那被按压凹陷的肌肉组织维持着受力的形状，没有回弹。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_11: $self$对于这漫长的抚摸毫无察觉，连呼吸和心跳都停滞在了一瞬间。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_12: $self$完全沦为了无意识的肉体容器，任由$target$的手指划过每一寸脊背肌肤。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_13: $self$像触电一样缩了一下肩膀，笑着躲开了。"好痒！别碰那里啦！"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_14: $self$敏捷地转身抓住了$target$的手腕。"现在不行，我在忙正事呢。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_15: $self$虽然没有生气，但还是坚定地移开了$target$的手。"有点不舒服，先别弄。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_16: $self$扭过头做个鬼脸："只有我不开心的时候才准你哄我。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_17: $self$向旁边挪了一个身位，避开了接触。"一身汗黏糊糊的，等我去洗个澡再说。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_18: $self$轻轻拍掉了$target$的手："别闹了，会被人看见的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_19: $self$不动声色地向前迈了一步，巧妙地拉开了距离。"抱歉，我不习惯这样。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_20: $self$礼貌而疏离地笑了笑，侧过身避开了手。"请自重，$target$先生/小姐。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_21: $self$轻轻挡住了$target$的手，语气温和但坚定。"虽然不想扫兴，但这有点越界了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_22: $self$有些困扰地挠了挠头："那个……能不能别这样？我会很紧张。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_23: $self$虽然在笑，但眼神里没有笑意。"我们好像还没熟到这个程度吧？"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_24: $self$若无其事地转身拿起桌上的文件，自然地打断了接触。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_25: $self$猛地甩开了$target$的手，眼神冰冷刺骨。"别碰我！"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_26: $self$像看垃圾一样看着$target$，嫌恶地拍了拍被碰过的衣服。"真恶心，离我远点。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_27: $self$毫不客气地一把推开$target$，声音提高了八度。"你在干什么？！想死吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_28: $self$冷笑一声，直接一巴掌打掉了伸过来的手。"谁给你的胆子？"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_29: $self$后退几步，做出了防御的姿态，眼里满是警惕和厌恶。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_30: $self$一言不发，但周围的气压明显低了下来，她转身就走。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_31: $self$整个人已经软绵绵地靠在椅背上，呼吸变得悠长而平稳。"呼……你的手法越来越好了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_32: $self$无意识地发出舒服的哼哼声，肩膀随着$target$的节奏轻微起伏。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_33: $self$转过头，眼神迷离地看着$target$："再往上面一点……对，就是那里。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_34: $self$的手不知何时已经覆盖在了$target$的手上，引导着动作。"别停……刚才那样很舒服。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_35: $self$脸上带着惬意的红晕，嘴角挂着满足的微笑。"感觉一天的疲惫都消失了呢。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_36: $self$甚至闭上了眼睛，完全把后背交给了$target$。"以后每天都帮我按按好不好？"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_37: $self$原本僵硬的身体逐渐软化，似乎意外地并不讨厌这种感觉。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_38: $self$有些不好意思地低下头，脸上浮现出一丝难以察觉的红晕。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_39: $self$不再像开始那样抗拒，甚至稍微调整了一下姿势配合。"手法……倒是不坏。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_40: $self$心里的防线似乎松动了一些，回头看向$target$的眼神柔和了许多。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_41: $self$虽然还在嘴硬，但身体已经不再躲闪。"这次就算了，下不为例。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_42: $self$轻轻叹息了一声，似乎在享受这种久违的放松感，暂时放下了戒备。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_43: $self$有些不耐烦地扭动了一下身体，试图摆脱$target$的手。"好了好了，有点痛了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_44: $self$的肌肉明显紧绷起来，不再配合$target$的动作。"……差不多可以了吧？"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_45: $self$叹了口气，直接坐直了身体，中断了接触。"你的手太凉了，弄得我很难受。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_46: $self$眉头皱起，回头瞪了$target$一眼。"一直摸同一个地方很烦人的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_47: $self$借口要去喝水，生硬地站了起来。"我去倒杯水。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_48: $self$不再说话，只是沉默地用行动表达着抗拒，把背转到了另一边。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_49: $self$再也忍受不了，猛地站起身撞开了椅子。"够了！你到底想干什么！"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_50: $self$一直积攒的怒气终于爆发，回头狠狠瞪着$target$。"你有完没完？"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_51: $self$虽然没有说话，但眼眶已经红了，满是委屈和愤怒。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_52: $self$突然感到一阵恶寒，用力搓着自己的手臂，逃也似地离开了座位。
zh-cn.com_touch_back_53: $self$深吸一口气，用最冰冷的语气说道："请你立刻停止，否则我就叫人了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_back_54: $self$浑身散发着拒绝的气息，像躲避瘟疫一样极力向旁边躲闪。

en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_1: $self$ senses something and sighs comfortably, leaning back into $target$'s embrace.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_2: $self$ doesn't look back, but naturally straightens her back to allow $target$'s palm to fit snugly.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_3: $self$ puts down what she was holding and narrows her eyes like a cat having its back stroked. "Mmm... it's a bit sore right there."
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_4: $self$ chuckles softly and gently pats the back of $target$'s hand, but doesn't push it away.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_5: $self$ relaxes her shoulders, lowering her head slightly to expose the nape of her neck, silently permitting $target$'s action.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_6: $self$ mutters "Don't tease," but her body honestly rubs against $target$'s palm.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_7: $self$ freezes for a moment, her body stiffening instantly, but she doesn't pull away immediately.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_8: $self$ looks back at $target$ in surprise, her eyes full of confusion, but she says nothing.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_9: $self$ is surprised, but maintains her posture out of politeness. "Uh... is something the matter?"
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_10: $self$ shrinks her neck awkwardly, seeming to assess the meaning of this action.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_11: $self$ smiles awkwardly, unsure of how to react, so she just lets $target$ keep the hand on her back.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_12: $self$ stops her movements and holds her breath, waiting for $target$'s next move.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_13: $self$ trembles all over but dares not look back, biting her lip tightly.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_14: $self$'s knuckles turn white from gripping her clothes tightly; though scared, she dares not resist.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_15: $self$ cringes like a frightened rabbit, eyes full of fear, yet forced to stay rooted to the spot.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_16: $self$ squeezes her eyes shut, seeming to endure great discomfort, her breathing becoming rapid and chaotic.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_17: $self$ keeps her head down, body extremely tense, as if $target$'s hand were a hot iron.
en-us.com_touch_back_Begin_18: $self$ looks completely resistant, but under $target$'s gaze, she forces herself not to flee.
en-us.com_touch_back_1: $self$ frowns in her sleep, seeming to feel something wandering on her back, and lets out a vague murmur.
en-us.com_touch_back_2: $self$ doesn't wake up, but instinctively pulls the blanket tighter, trying to block out the hand.
en-us.com_touch_back_3: $self$'s breathing remains even; she is completely defenseless against the touch on her back, immersed in deep sleep.
en-us.com_touch_back_4: $self$ feels comfortable from the touch and unconsciously nuzzles her cheek against the pillow like a sleeping small animal.
en-us.com_touch_back_5: $self$ rolls over, exposing her back completely under $target$'s hand, continuing to sleep unaware.
en-us.com_touch_back_6: $self$'s lips part slightly as she lets out a soft hum, making the most primal physiological response to the intruder's behavior.
en-us.com_touch_back_7: $self$ remains frozen in the air in her original pose, enduring the touch from behind without any perception.
en-us.com_touch_back_8: Red marks from the stroking are left on $self$'s skin, but her eyes continue to stare lifelessly into the void.
en-us.com_touch_back_9: $self$ remains motionless like an exquisite doll, showing no physiological feedback to the palm wandering over her spine.
en-us.com_touch_back_10: $self$ is still in the rift of time; the muscle tissue pressed down maintains the indented shape without rebounding.
en-us.com_touch_back_11: $self$ is completely unaware of this prolonged caress; even her breathing and heartbeat are halted in an instant.
en-us.com_touch_back_12: $self$ has become a completely unconscious vessel of flesh, allowing $target$'s fingers to trace every inch of her back's skin.
en-us.com_touch_back_13: $self$ shrinks her shoulders as if electrocuted and dodges with a laugh. "That tickles! Don't touch there!"
en-us.com_touch_back_14: $self$ turns agilely and grabs $target$'s wrist. "Not now, I'm busy with something important."
en-us.com_touch_back_15: $self$ isn't angry, but firmly moves $target$'s hand away. "It's a bit uncomfortable, let's not do that right now."
en-us.com_touch_back_16: $self$ turns her head and makes a funny face: "I only let you coax me when I'm unhappy."
en-us.com_touch_back_17: $self$ moves a step aside, avoiding the contact. "I'm all sweaty and sticky, wait until I take a shower."
en-us.com_touch_back_18: $self$ gently slaps $target$'s hand away: "Stop it, people might see."
en-us.com_touch_back_19: $self$ quietly takes a step forward, subtly creating distance. "Sorry, I'm not used to this."
en-us.com_touch_back_20: $self$ smiles politely but distantly, turning sideways to avoid the hand. "Please have some respect, Mr./Ms. $target$."
en-us.com_touch_back_21: $self$ gently blocks $target$'s hand, her tone gentle but firm. "I don't mean to be a killjoy, but this is crossing the line."
en-us.com_touch_back_22: $self$ scratches her head in distress: "Um... could you not? It makes me nervous."
en-us.com_touch_back_23: $self$ is smiling, but the smile doesn't reach her eyes. "We aren't that close yet, are we?"
en-us.com_touch_back_24: $self$ turns around as if nothing happened and picks up a file from the table, naturally breaking the contact.
en-us.com_touch_back_25: $self$ violently throws off $target$'s hand, her eyes piercingly cold. "Don't touch me!"
en-us.com_touch_back_26: $self$ looks at $target$ like trash and disgustedly pats the clothes that were touched. "Disgusting, stay away from me."
en-us.com_touch_back_27: $self$ rudely pushes $target$ away, her voice raised an octave. "What are you doing?! Do you want to die?"
en-us.com_touch_back_28: $self$ sneers and directly slaps the reaching hand away. "Who gave you the nerve?"
en-us.com_touch_back_29: $self$ steps back into a defensive stance, eyes full of wariness and disgust.
en-us.com_touch_back_30: $self$ says nothing, but the air pressure drops significantly as she turns and walks away.
en-us.com_touch_back_31: $self$ is already leaning limply against the chair back, her breathing long and steady. "Phew... your technique is getting better."
en-us.com_touch_back_32: $self$ unconsciously hums in comfort, her shoulders rising and falling slightly with $target$'s rhythm.
en-us.com_touch_back_33: $self$ turns her head, looking at $target$ with hazy eyes: "A little higher... yes, right there."
en-us.com_touch_back_34: $self$'s hand has unknowingly covered $target$'s, guiding the movement. "Don't stop... that felt good just now."
en-us.com_touch_back_35: $self$ has a contented flush on her face and a satisfied smile on her lips. "I feel like the day's fatigue has vanished."
en-us.com_touch_back_36: $self$ even closes her eyes, completely entrusting her back to $target$. "Will you massage me like this every day?"
en-us.com_touch_back_37: $self$'s originally stiff body gradually softens; she seems surprisingly accepting of the sensation.
en-us.com_touch_back_38: $self$ looks down shyly, a faint, barely noticeable blush appearing on her face.
en-us.com_touch_back_39: $self$ no longer resists as she did at first, and even adjusts her posture slightly to cooperate. "The technique... isn't bad."
en-us.com_touch_back_40: $self$'s inner defenses seem to loosen, and the look she gives $target$ softens considerably.
en-us.com_touch_back_41: $self$ is still tough with her words, but her body no longer dodges. "I'll let it slide this time, but not again."
en-us.com_touch_back_42: $self$ sighs softly, seeming to enjoy this long-lost relaxation, temporarily letting down her guard.
en-us.com_touch_back_43: $self$ twists her body impatiently, trying to escape $target$'s hand. "Okay, okay, it hurts a bit now."
en-us.com_touch_back_44: $self$'s muscles tense up visibly, no longer cooperating with $target$'s movements. "...That's enough, right?"
en-us.com_touch_back_45: $self$ sighs and sits up straight, breaking the contact. "Your hands are too cold, it's making me uncomfortable."
en-us.com_touch_back_46: $self$ frowns and turns back to glare at $target$. "Touching the same spot constantly is annoying."
en-us.com_touch_back_47: $self$ uses getting water as an excuse and stands up stiffly. "I'm going to get some water."
en-us.com_touch_back_48: $self$ stops talking and silently expresses her resistance by action, turning her back to the other side.
en-us.com_touch_back_49: $self$ can't take it anymore, standing up abruptly and knocking the chair over. "Enough! What exactly do you want!"
en-us.com_touch_back_50: $self$'s accumulated anger finally explodes, turning back to glare at $target$. "Are you done yet?"
en-us.com_touch_back_51: $self$ doesn't speak, but her eyes are red, full of grievance and anger.
en-us.com_touch_back_52: $self$ suddenly feels a chill, rubbing her arms vigorously as she flees the seat.
en-us.com_touch_back_53: $self$ takes a deep breath and says in the coldest tone: "Please stop immediately, or I'll call for help."
en-us.com_touch_back_54: $self$ exudes an aura of rejection, dodging to the side as if avoiding a plague.
